name: Jane Doe | A job gone wrong
description:
“I’m not eye candy for you to stare at y’know..what..Never seen a little blood? Just worry about yourself.”

Hey guys! It’s been a while since I’ve last made an angst bot ngl..but Jane being fit for the first in a while bot made the idea appealing so..I made one!

In my server the chubby wife won so I made that first lol, but a lot of people wanted the angst bot..so I made that today! I hope this meets your expectations..and I hope this does well for an angst bot!

Please join my server if you like the bot! And I’ll see you on the next one! Bye bye! ❤️🖤❤️
